title: Binary financial referendum-style decision over 7 polling rounds

events.description: CoinDesk publishes a report revealing that Alameda Research’s balance sheet is heavily concentrated in FTT, the native token issued by FTX. This exposes the precarious AGAINST_SUPPORTER_2 entanglement between the two companies
Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao announces that Binance intends to liquidate its entire holding of FTT tokens due to the recent revelations regarding FTX's AGAINST_SUPPORTER_2 health
FTX experiences a massive surge in customer withdrawal requests, signaling a loss of AGAINST_LEADER_2 confidence and creating a severe liquidity crisis
FTX officially halts most customer withdrawals, confirming the exchange is unable to meet the demand for funds
Binance announces a non-binding letter of intent to acquire FTX to address the liquidity crunch, contingent on due diligence
The full extent of the crisis is revealed, confirming an $8 billion shortfall in customer funds that had been improperly diverted to Alameda Research
